overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair walking through a neon-lit covered walkway, ascending stairs, and crossing a futuristic cyberpunk city street with glowing billboards and light vehicle traffic.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway toward the distant exit

entered.detail: enclosed concrete corridor with teal ambient lighting and industrial ceiling beams
illuminated advertisements and posters on the right wall
distant cyan and purple neon light sources from vending machines or storefronts

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a covered concrete walkway with teal artificial lighting. The camera moves forward through the enclosed corridor with industrial ceiling beams and wall posters visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza at base of stairs with neon billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with large neon billboards visible ahead
begins ascending concrete stairs toward street level

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza and beginning to climb the concrete stairs to the upper level

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'WET DREAM' text with anime-style character
wide concrete staircase leading up to street level
brightly lit shop entrance with pink and green neon signage

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway into an open plaza with prominent neon billboards including one displaying 'WET DREAM'. The environment transitions from enclosed to semi-open as the character approaches and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway ascending to elevated street level

events.description: reaches top of stairs and emerges at street level with traffic visible

agents.ego_description: climbing the final steps and emerging onto the street level sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic white truck driving past on the street below

entered.detail: opening at top of stairs revealing the street and buildings above
tall building with glass and steel cyberpunk architecture and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the concrete stairs toward street level, with the staircase structure dominating the foreground. Upon reaching the top, the scene opens to reveal a futuristic street with passing vehicles and towering cyberpunk buildings with neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: purple sports car passes through the intersection while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide street at the marked crosswalk, moving toward the opposite sidewalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: purple sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with 'WALK' text projection
tall pole with pedestrian signal showing yellow walk symbol
concrete planters and seating along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the street level and enters a wide crosswalk with bold yellow stripes. While crossing, a purple sports car passes through the intersection. The scene features towering futuristic buildings with massive neon billboards and a traffic light pole with illuminated pedestrian signals.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed industrial corridor into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a futuristic city. It begins by moving forward through a covered concrete walkway illuminated by teal artificial lighting and lined with industrial beams and wall posters. As the character exits the corridor, the environment opens into a semi-open plaza dominated by glowing billboards, including one for Wet Dream, before the camera follows the character up a wide concrete staircase. Upon reaching the top, the scene expands to reveal a towering cityscape of neon signage and passing vehicles. The movement finally leads the character across a wide crosswalk with bold yellow stripes as a purple sports car glides through the intersection beneath massive digital displays and illuminated traffic signals.
